prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of a graceful young woman with shoulder-length brown hair viewed from a dramatic low angle, standing beneath a brilliant midday sky filled with fluffy white clouds. She wears an elegant flowing kimono-inspired gown: a white satin bodice, sheer translucent white sleeves with purple ribbon ties, a wide ornate gold obi belt with floral decoration and dangling bead tassels, and a deep blue-to-violet layered skirt with embroidered flowers and a high slit. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square blur, while her pose is expressive and magical: one arm reaches straight upward toward the sun with the hand open and all five fingers visible, and the other arm extends outward with an open hand and five visible fingers. Around her body swirl luminous ribbons of water and sparkling crystal-like droplets, forming spirals and arcs that lead toward a radiant sun halo above her raised hand. Use sky blue, white, violet, indigo, gold, and iridescent highlights, ethereal fantasy lighting, lens flare, glittering particles, translucent fabric motion, highly detailed costume textures, photorealistic anime-realism, dynamic composition, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, dramatic backlighting, 9:16 aspect ratio.
